title: Walt Whitman.
content:
For erratic style he leads van,
            Wildly wayward Walt Whitman,
            He done grand work in civil war,
            For he did dress many a scar,
            And kindly wet the hot parched mouth
            Of Northern soldiers wounded South.
meaning:
James McIntyre's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Walt Whitman."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
